title: penstemon glandulosus
intro: Penstemon glandulosus, also known as the sticky penstemon or glandular penstemon, is a perennial plant species native to the western United States and Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory activities, making it a potential treatment for wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, Penstemon glandulosus can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
